title: redmine_pulse — Roadmap Specification (Portfolio Cockpit Extensions)
design_spine: N-signal registry (C1) is the keystone; five of six features compose on it; backward-compatible default reproduces today's output byte-for-byte.

contracts.name: N-signal registry generalization
contracts.summary: Generalize scoring from hardcoded 5 signals to an N-signal registry (enable flags + renormalizing weights; completeness=active/enabled_count; dominant over enabled set). Default config reproduces current output byte-identical.

contracts.name: coverage_gap signal (planning coverage)
contracts.summary: 6th signal = planning coverage over open issues (has_estimate/has_assignee/has_schedule). Additive-optional, default OFF.

contracts.name: custom ranking lenses
contracts.summary: Declarative validated CustomLens + shared WeightSet VO; normalized weighted-mean ranking over signals; no formula DSL.

contracts.name: scoring profiles & per-viewer scoring
contracts.summary: Selectable ScoringProfile presets (admin) + viewer override + role-default binding. Active profile id folded into cache partition (security).

contracts.name: saved views
contracts.summary: pulse_views config table (reversible) mirroring Redmine IssueQuery: private/public/role-scoped; :manage_public_pulse_views permission; built-in default views.

contracts.name: scheduled recompute & alerting
contracts.summary: rake recompute + scan_and_alert (cron, no worker); per-project alert-state; triggers = rag_transition/dominant_change/no_data_appeared/score_delta; recipients = view-permitted + subscribed (perm re-checked at send); mailer + in-app.

contracts.name: outbound webhooks
contracts.summary: Outbound webhook port+adapter consuming AlertEvent; global+per-project endpoints, off by default; HMAC-SHA256; SSRF guard default-on overridable; bounded retry; HTTPS-only default.

operator_confirmed_decisions.per_viewer_depth: admin presets + viewer override + role-default binding
